channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Lisette - Tue Apr 14 16:58:46 UTC 2026
item.description:
Language support for Lisette in GoLand, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, and other LSP-capable JetBrains IDEs. Backed by the lis lsp language server. Requires the lis CLI to be...
vendor: ivov downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: run.lisette.plugin

item.title: UUID v7 Generator - Tue Apr 14 13:30:36 UTC 2026
item.description:
Generate a time-ordered UUID v7 directly in your editor. UUID v7 is a time-based unique identifier that is lexicographically sortable, making it ideal for database...
vendor: Egor Bratukhin downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: by.bratukhin.uuidv7

item.title: Madock Integration - Sun Apr 12 19:09:41 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: CopyShortRevisionNumber - Tue Apr 14 13:46:35 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Koutaro Miura downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.k.pmpstudy.CopyShortRevisionNumber

item.title: WLZN API SYNC - Tue Apr 14 08:20:26 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: HWL downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.hwl.syncApi
